launch_inputs.filing_source: Extract the material compliance-control fields from the uploaded quarterly filing excerpt about audit exports, retries, and evidence retention.
launch_inputs.target_fields_or_schema: reporting period, customer segment, export control statements, disclosed incidents, mitigation commitments, evidence retention notes
launch_inputs.normalization_rules: Keep normalized field names, note section references, and preserve ambiguity when the filing language is forward-looking or conditional.
